meta..validate: newData.val() == null || (newData.hasChildren(['round', 'phase', 'events']) && newData.child('round').isNumber() && newData.child('round').val() >= 1 && newData.child('round').val() <= 3 && newData.child('phase').isString() && newData.child('phase').val().matches(/^(planning|reveal|finished)$/))
